evals.prompt: I need cert revocation for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-revocation skill for this certificate revocation request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects certificate-revocation for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_revocation.
Keeps the response focused on checking certificate revocation status via OCSP (Online Certificate Status Protocol) and CRL (Certificate Revocation List).

evals.prompt: Check whether the certificate for example.com is revoked using OCSP and CRL data.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-revocation skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-revocation instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
